chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1488 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.11.2025 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Masood Rasool Babar, advocate for respondent Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the respondent University under the cover of his statement files photocopy of order dated 02.12.2024 and states that review application preferred by the petitioner (available at page-87 of the Court’s file) stood decided by the Syndicate by means of order, referred to above, therefore, this petition has become infructuous and liable to be dismissed accordingly. On being confronted, petitioner submits that he may be permitted to avail remedy in accordance with law, challenging the legality of order passed on his review application. In view of the above, this petition has become infructuous and the same stands disposed of accordingly. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail remedy against the order passed on review application before the competent forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
